name: Death's Wind
location: Eastshore Islets Camp in Auridon, Chill House in Glenumbra, Armature's Upheaval in Stonefalls

bonuses.stat: When you take melee damage while you are under 35% Health, you knockback and stun all enemies within 8 meters of you for 4 seconds. This effect can occur once every 15 seconds.
